svg.title: The updated trivium and quadrivium work together as one formation system for public capability.
svg.desc: The diagram groups read, write, and reason together as one band and quantify, compute, orchestrate, and represent as another. At the center is a label showing responsible public practice or visible capability. The overall point is that the capacities reinforce one another and appear in artifacts and decisions.
svg.text: The updated trivium and quadrivium work together as one formation system for public capability.
